text.title: Unattended Upgrades Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding the Unattended Upgrades methodology. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: Unattended-Upgrade::Allowed-Origins MUST include ONLY ${distro_id}:${distro_codename}-security (and ESM equivalents). NEVER -updates / -backports.

rationale.source: Ubuntu Server Guide + Debian unattended-upgrades package docs

rule.rationale: Security-only updates are vetted by Ubuntu Security; -updates can break service compatibility unexpectedly.

rule.statement: Unattended-Upgrade::Automatic-Reboot-Time set to a window with low traffic (e.g. '04:00'). Automatic-Reboot 'true'. NEVER leave default 'now'.
rule.rationale: Default reboot-now triggers mid-day; explicit window matches operator change-management.

rule.statement: Unattended-Upgrade::Mail and Unattended-Upgrade::MailReport configured with a real, monitored address (or tg-send hook). Silent failures forbidden.
rule.rationale: Upgrades fail (held packages, disk full); silent failures pile up.

rule.statement: UpgradePlan names a single owner. 'team' / 'we' / '' are forbidden.
Daily cron runs check-reboot-required.sh and alerts when /var/run/reboot-required appears AND the reboot window hasn't applied within 7 days (kernel upgrade not yet effective).
rule.rationale: Operator may have set Automatic-Reboot=false; without a check, kernel upgrades sit unapplied.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do not run this methodology — route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent's context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above when complexity is light), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-unattended-upgrades.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
